'''pavaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enaliarctid|enaliarctid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-v-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enaliarctid|enaliarctid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pavaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pævæjæth|pævæjæth]] || [[word:pævæjæj|pævæjæj]] || [[word:pævæjæsh|pævæjæsh]] || [[word:pævæjæ|pævæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pavavajath|pavavajath]] || [[word:pavavajaj|pavavajaj]] || [[word:pavavajash|pavavajash]] || [[word:pavavaja|pavavaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pavajath|pavajath]] || [[word:pavajaj|pavajaj]] || [[word:pavajash|pavajash]] || [[word:pavaja|pavaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pavafjath|pavafjath]] || [[word:pavafjaj|pavafjaj]] || [[word:pavafjash|pavafjash]] || [[word:pavafjaf|pavafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pavajatha|pavajatha]] || [[word:pavajaja|pavajaja]] || [[word:pavajasha|pavajasha]] || [[word:pavajaka|pavajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pavajath|pavajath]] || [[word:pavajaj|pavajaj]] || [[word:pavajash|pavajash]] || [[word:pavaja|pavaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pavajathal|pavajathal]] || [[word:pavajajal|pavajajal]] || [[word:pavajashal|pavajashal]] || [[word:pavajakal|pavajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pavajathatha|pavajathatha]] || [[word:pavajajaja|pavajajaja]] || [[word:pavajashasha|pavajashasha]] || [[word:pavajaka|pavajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pavajathan|pavajathan]] || [[word:pavajajan|pavajajan]] || [[word:pavajashan|pavajashan]] || [[word:pavajakan|pavajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pavajathaoro|pavajathaoro]] || [[word:pavajajaoro|pavajajaoro]] || [[word:pavajashaoro|pavajashaoro]] || [[word:pavajakaoro|pavajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
